profile: Otherworld Assassin (UR); Physical AOE / Clone Assault. Win condition is the Ultimate 'Havoc in Heaven' — consumes [Life-Saving Hair] to summon 9+ clones that each strike random enemies (120% DMG, 25% on repeat hits), generating an enormous number of separate hit instances. His kit constantly spawns extra clones (on damage taken, on Cosmic Strike, on enemy deaths) and can auto-fire the Ultimate at high stacks. He scales with ATK, Final DMG, AOE-DMG, per-hit True DMG, DEF-Ignore and Ultimate DMG; he does NOT use basic attacks, crit (no native crit lever), bleed/infect, healing, or single-target focus. Mirrors that add value per-hit or per-AOE shine; basic-atk / single-target / crit / DoT-applier / support picks are dead weight.

ranking.name: Wukong
ranking.reason: His own themed mirror: 'All attacks deal an additional 5%-20% of ATK as True Damage.' Every clone hit and skill instance triggers it, so his huge multi-hit Ultimate multiplies this into massive uncapped True DMG. Perfect fit.

ranking.name: Horde-Assault
ranking.reason: AOE Skill adds 100%-400% ATK True DMG split across all targets; his Ultimate and Feat are AOE, so this lands every fight as bonus AOE True DMG. Top-tier for an AOE caster.

ranking.name: Firmament
ranking.reason: Flat +12%-30% Final DMG, unconditional, anima-tier magnitude. Multiplies every clone hit and the whole Ultimate burst with zero conditions.

ranking.name: Royal Awe
ranking.reason: +10%-20% DMG (up to +60% at 5*) for repeatedly attacking the same enemy in a turn — his clones constantly re-hit targets (repeat hits scenario), so the stack ceiling is reached easily during Havoc.

ranking.name: Throat-Slitting
ranking.reason: Starts at +20%-45% Final DMG, resets on kill. His AOE Ultimate routinely secures kills, refreshing the buff; huge front-loaded multiplier on his nuke turn.

ranking.name: Wasteward
ranking.reason: Each attack stacks +3%-5% Final DMG (up to +50%). His clone barrage and multi-hit kit ramp the stacks fast; anima magnitude. Slightly slower to peak than flat Final DMG.

ranking.name: Uncle Ying
ranking.reason: +8%-20% Ultimate DMG. His Ultimate is the entire payload (and he gets an Ultimate DMG bonus natively), so this directly amplifies his win condition.

ranking.name: Aurora
ranking.reason: +5%-15% DEF Ignore. His clones deal physical DMG; DEF-Ignore raises the floor of every hit against armored enemies — clean unconditional DPS.

ranking.name: Mister
ranking.reason: Flat +2%-5% ATK. His clone DMG (120% per clone) and the Wukong True-DMG mirror both scale off ATK, so a global ATK% boost compounds across every hit.

ranking.name: Michael
ranking.reason: +3%-6% Final DMG per buff on self (up to +30%). He self-buffs (Ultimate DMG bonus, Genesis states, Life-Saving Hair-driven buffs), so he sustains a healthy stack of Final DMG.

ranking.name: Luna
ranking.reason: +10%-25% Area Attack DMG. His Ultimate and Feat are area attacks, so a large slice of his damage is buffed — strong, just narrower than flat Final DMG.

ranking.name: Scale-Splitting
ranking.reason: Basic Attack adds True DMG (capped at 4-6 triggers/turn). Wu Kong rarely basic-attacks, so the base clause is mostly dead — but the per-hit True DMG model still grazes his clone hits and the anima stat line is high; bench filler, not the basic-atk dream it is for auto-attackers.

ranking.name: Isabella
ranking.reason: +4%-10% Final DMG base (the conditional vs-Shield bonus is situational). The flat portion alone is decent unconditional DPS.

ranking.name: Yin
ranking.reason: Flat +2%-5% Final DMG. Universally useful but small (epic magnitude); fine bench filler behind the anima Final-DMG mirrors.

ranking.name: Ananke Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: +5%-20% Final DMG base is always on; the big bonus needs enemies in Damage Share/Transfer (situational), so he banks the flat half reliably.

ranking.name: Nuwa Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: +5%-20% Final DMG base (Damage-Share bonus is conditional). Solid flat DPS half; the Effect-Resist rider is a minor survivability perk.

ranking.name: Baleful Omen
ranking.reason: +5%-15% Final DMG plus a chance to apply [Lethal] (blocks resurrection). The Final DMG is the draw; his many hits make the Lethal proc reliable in long fights.

ranking.name: Alucard
ranking.reason: Crit Rate & Crit DMG. He has only a sliver of native crit (Genesis III's 2 clones at 30%), so most clone hits won't crit — value is mostly the stat stick, not the crit engine.

ranking.name: Nyx Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: Extra True DMG on passively-triggered AOE skills (1-3/turn). His clone spawns are passive triggers, so it can fire — but the tight per-turn cap limits it on a hero who throws dozens of hits.

ranking.name: Ada
ranking.reason: +8%-20% ATK DMG vs enemies with a Debuff. Conditional on team applying debuffs; when met it's a clean DPS boost across his AOE hits.

ranking.name: Sherry
ranking.reason: Bleed-extension mirror — Wu Kong applies no [Bleed], so the effect never triggers. Only the tiny base stats apply.

ranking.name: Ying Gou
ranking.reason: Infect-extension mirror — he applies no [Infect], so it's inert; dead effect, stats only.

ranking.name: Ling
ranking.reason: Bonus True DMG only vs [Infect] targets — he can't infect, so it relies entirely on a teammate; unreliable and once/turn.

ranking.name: Lucifer
ranking.reason: Bonus True DMG vs targets with [DMG Over Time] — Wu Kong applies no DoT, so it depends on allies; conditional and capped.

ranking.name: Kira
ranking.reason: +8%-20% Single-target ATK DMG. He is a pure AOE/clone hero; his random-target clones aren't single-target focus, so most of his output ignores this.

ranking.name: Valendine
ranking.reason: Single Attack damage scaling vs low-HP targets — single-target gated, anti-thematic to his AOE clone barrage.

ranking.name: Lilith
ranking.reason: Single Skill Attack bonus per debuff — single-target gated and debuff-dependent; his AOE kit doesn't fit either condition.

ranking.name: Vivi
ranking.reason: Flat Crit Rate. With almost no native crit, raw crit rate barely converts; a small generic stat at best.

ranking.name: Aelia
ranking.reason: Flat Crit DMG. Useless without crit chance — his clones rarely crit, so this multiplies an event that almost never happens.

ranking.name: Mars Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: True DMG on Feat Skill CRIT hits. His Feat is a useful skill, but the crit gate kills it — he has no crit support, so the trigger rarely lands.

ranking.name: Daisy
ranking.reason: +5%-20% Final DMG (good) but the [Hunt] payload is pure crit stacking — wasted on a non-crit hero, and [Hunt] is removed when HE kills, which he does every Ultimate. Net: weak.

ranking.name: Hinata Inori
ranking.reason: On ally-death: big Crit + Final DMG. The crit half is wasted on him and it requires allies dying; only the Final DMG sliver is usable, conditionally.

ranking.name: Night Depths
ranking.reason: True DMG scaling with HP lost. He's a front-mid bruiser so stacks build, but it's slow and he prefers proactive multipliers over a survival-gated ramp.

ranking.name: Adele
ranking.reason: Pure Basic Attack DMG (+ basic-attack crit at 3*). Wu Kong's damage is clones and skills, not basic attacks — the entire effect is dead for him.

ranking.name: Renais
ranking.reason: Basic-Attack DMG buff and an on-kill BASIC ATTACK. The canonical basic-attack carry — but Wu Kong barely basic-attacks, so both the ramp and the on-kill re-attack are wasted.

ranking.name: Van Helsing
ranking.reason: Ultimate DMG that ramps via BASIC ATTACKS. The Ultimate scaling fits, but he gains the buff through basic attacks he never makes, so it stays near its small base value.

ranking.name: Rose
ranking.reason: Final DMG per attack — workable in theory — but the value is small (eternal not anima) and overlaps strictly worse than Wasteward/Firmament for him; the basic-vs-ultimate split adds nothing he leverages.

ranking.name: Tinplate
ranking.reason: Counter True DMG scaling off DEF. He's an offensive Assassin with low DEF, so the reflected damage is negligible; def-mirror on a glass DPS.

ranking.name: Titan Strength
ranking.reason: ATK/DEF only WHILE carrying a Shield. He has no self-shield source, so the buff almost never activates; conditional dead weight.

ranking.name: Gaia Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: HP% + AOE True DMG when taking a lethal hit. Defensive/death-gated; he wants to be nuking, not surviving lethal hits, and the HP% does little for a DPS.

ranking.name: Arthur
ranking.reason: ATK DMG vs enemies under [Control]. He applies no control; fully reliant on allies and a control window — unreliable for his kit.

ranking.name: Zhiming
ranking.reason: Final DMG RED (defensive). A pure survivability stat that does nothing for his AOE damage output.

ranking.name: Lincoln
ranking.reason: Crit DMG RED (anti-crit defense). Defensive and irrelevant to a burst AOE caster's output.

ranking.name: Galos
ranking.reason: Flat DEF%. Tank stat with no offensive value and tiny magnitude on a glass DPS.

ranking.name: Frankenstein
ranking.reason: Flat HP%. Survivability filler that adds nothing to his damage.

ranking.name: Albert
ranking.reason: Larger HP% (legendary). More survivability than Frankenstein but still zero contribution to his AOE nuke.

ranking.name: Dark Tide
ranking.reason: HP% + DMG when HP higher than enemy. The DMG rider is minor and the package is a tank profile mismatched to a burst assassin.

ranking.name: Dracula
ranking.reason: HP% + Healing Received scaling. Sustain-tank mirror, off-profile for a glass AOE DPS.

ranking.name: Jacob
ranking.reason: Final DMG + DMG RED that ramps with HP lost. Half offense, but the bruiser/low-HP gate is slow and weaker than his unconditional Final-DMG options.

ranking.name: Eternal Stand
ranking.reason: Stacking Final DMG RED on being hit. Pure defense; no offensive contribution to his clone barrage.

ranking.name: Rock Elephant
ranking.reason: Excess-DMG reduction on big hits. Tank survivability anima with no DPS value for him.

ranking.name: Frostglow
ranking.reason: Flat +12%-30% Final DMG RED. Big number but entirely defensive — wrong axis for a burst DPS.

ranking.name: Garvin
ranking.reason: Final DMG RED (legendary). Defensive only; irrelevant to his offensive role.

ranking.name: Azmodan
ranking.reason: Counter-Bleed on being attacked. Defensive, reactive, and Bleed-themed — he neither tanks nor benefits from bleed; near-dead.

ranking.name: Sariel
ranking.reason: Counter-Infect on being attacked. Reactive defensive control he can't leverage offensively.

ranking.name: Bathory
ranking.reason: Effect Hit Rate. He applies no debuffs/control to land, so accuracy on effects is wasted.

ranking.name: Raphael
ranking.reason: Effect Resist Rate (anti-CC defense). Minor survivability that does nothing for damage; he already has partial control immunity natively.

ranking.name: Alluring Gaze
ranking.reason: Effect Resist Rate buff. Defensive anti-CC only — no offensive value, and his kit already resists control.

ranking.name: Elbera‘s Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: Effect Resist + small self-heal on buff expiry. Defensive/sustain utility unrelated to his AOE damage.

ranking.name: Elegy
ranking.reason: Heal-reduction on CRIT. Crit-gated (he barely crits) and applies a debuff he doesn't need — dead on both counts.

ranking.name: Enchantress
ranking.reason: Effect-Hit + [Fox Fire] control/DoT engine. He has no effect-hit build and applies no DoT; the whole package misfires for him.

ranking.name: Mystic Bull
ranking.reason: Team-wide Shield at battle start — a support mirror. Zero personal DPS contribution for a solo-burst assassin.

ranking.name: Warding Blessing
ranking.reason: On-death ally Shield — pure support utility, does nothing for his offense and requires him to die first.

ranking.name: Flame Dawn
ranking.reason: Self-revive on death. A survivability crutch with no offensive value; off-role for a damage-dealer slot.

ranking.name: Theresa
ranking.reason: Increases healing done — a healer mirror. Wu Kong does no healing, so the effect is completely inert.

ranking.name: Heidi
ranking.reason: Buffs single-target heal skills. He has none; entirely dead effect.

ranking.name: Orpheus
ranking.reason: Self-heal at turn start. Pure sustain with no damage value; wasted on a burst DPS slot.

ranking.name: Venus
ranking.reason: Support DMG-RED mirror with empty/null effect text in the data — no usable offensive effect for him; bottom of the list.

ranking.name: Jeanne
ranking.reason: Final DMG RED + heal/true-DMG-mitigation, strongest while in Damage Share state. A tank/support mirror with no offensive value for him, and he is not the team damage sink; defensive package off-role for a burst AOE DPS.
